title: Unity SMP 2
description: This Modpack is used for the Unity SMP
body:
The Unity SMP 2 Modpack will make Minecraft So much More FUN! it adds 150+ Mods which includes Mods like: Biomes o Plenty, Dungeons and Taverns, Farmers Delight and much more!

This Modpack makes every section of Minecraft Fun like for example if you go Mining a Loot Chest might spawn with the Mine Treasure Mod! 
or if you are Trading with Villagers you dont have to wait for the Trades to reset, you can trade infinitly with Villagers and Cycle Trades with a click of a button!

You can explore for Hours in this Modpack there are countless of new Structures and Biomes in the Game.

(This modpack is only for use of the Unity SMP Members)
